ddls:
CREATE TABLE "energy_data" (
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the energy data */,
  "hour" INTEGER /* Hour of the day (1-24) */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the location */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the data source */,
  "da_demd" REAL /* Day-ahead demand */,
  "demand" REAL /* Actual demand */,
  "da_lmp" REAL /* Day-ahead locational marginal price */,
  "da_ec" REAL /* Day-ahead energy charge */,
  "da_cc" REAL /* Day-ahead congestion charge */,
  "da_mlc" REAL /* Day-ahead marginal loss component */,
  "rt_lmp" REAL /* Real-time locational marginal price */,
  "rt_ec" REAL /* Real-time energy charge */,
  "rt_cc" REAL /* Real-time congestion charge */,
  "rt_mlc" REAL /* Real-time marginal loss component */,
  "forecast_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the forecasted demand */,
  "energy_type" TEXT /* Type of energy (e.g., renewable, non-renewable) */,
  "grid_status" TEXT /* Status of the grid (e.g., operational, maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("date", "hour", "location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the weather data */,
  "hour" INTEGER /* Hour of the day (1-24) */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the location */,
  "dry_bulb" INTEGER /* Dry bulb temperature */,
  "dew_pnt" INTEGER /* Dew point temperature */,
  "humidity" INTEGER /* Relative humidity */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Amount of precipitation */,
  "cloud_cover" INTEGER /* Cloud cover percentage */,
  "atmospheric_pressure" REAL /* Atmospheric pressure */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("date", "hour", "location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_demand_forecast" (
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the forecast */,
  "hour" INTEGER /* Hour of the day (1-24) */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the location */,
  "forecast_demand" REAL /* Forecasted energy demand */,
  "confidence_interval" REAL /* Confidence interval of the forecast */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the forecasting model */,
  "forecast_date" TEXT /* Date when the forecast was made */,
  "forecast_method" TEXT /* Method used for forecasting */,
  "forecast_confidence" TEXT /* Confidence level of the forecast */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("date", "hour", "location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the location */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the location */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the location */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the data source (e.g., smart grid, pricing feed) */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "source_location" TEXT /* Location of the data source */,
  "source_contact" TEXT /* Contact information for the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for the data source
Status of the grid (e.g., operational, maintenance)
Unique identifier for the forecasting model
Date when the forecast was made
Unique identifier for the data source
Type of the data source (e.g., smart grid, pricing feed)
Contact information for the data source
